'''âdh-w-r''' ('''kadhawar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:newmodel|newmodel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:newmodel|newmodel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-w-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadhawar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhawar|thidhawar]] || [[word:jidhawar|jidhawar]] || [[word:shidhawar|shidhawar]] || [[word:kidhawar|kidhawar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhawar|thuthudhawar]] || [[word:jujudhawar|jujudhawar]] || [[word:shushudhawar|shushudhawar]] || [[word:kukudhawar|kukudhawar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhawar|thudhawar]] || [[word:judhawar|judhawar]] || [[word:shudhawar|shudhawar]] || [[word:kudhawar|kudhawar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhawar|thudhawar]] || [[word:judhawar|judhawar]] || [[word:shudhawar|shudhawar]] || [[word:kudhawar|kudhawar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhawar|thedhawar]] || [[word:jedhawar|jedhawar]] || [[word:shedhawar|shedhawar]] || [[word:kedhawar|kedhawar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhawar|thothodhawar]] || [[word:jojodhawar|jojodhawar]] || [[word:shoshodhawar|shoshodhawar]] || [[word:kokodhawar|kokodhawar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhawar|thodhawar]] || [[word:jodhawar|jodhawar]] || [[word:shodhawar|shodhawar]] || [[word:kodhawar|kodhawar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhawar|thodhawar]] || [[word:jodhawar|jodhawar]] || [[word:shodhawar|shodhawar]] || [[word:kodhawar|kodhawar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhawar|thĂŠdhawar]] || [[word:jĂŠdhawar|jĂŠdhawar]] || [[word:shĂŠdhawar|shĂŠdhawar]] || [[word:kĂŠdhawar|kĂŠdhawar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhawar|thathadhawar]] || [[word:jajadhawar|jajadhawar]] || [[word:shashadhawar|shashadhawar]] || [[word:kakadhawar|kakadhawar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhawar|thadhawar]] || [[word:jadhawar|jadhawar]] || [[word:shadhawar|shadhawar]] || [[word:kadhawar|kadhawar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhawar|thadhawar]] || [[word:jadhawar|jadhawar]] || [[word:shadhawar|shadhawar]] || [[word:kadhawar|kadhawar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhawar|shadhawar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhawar|goshadhawar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhawar|gokishadhawar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhawarnĂŒ|shadhawarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhawarnknĂŒ|goshadhawarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhawarnĂŒ|gokishadhawarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhawarshĂ«|shadhawarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkshĂ«|goshadhawarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhawarshĂ«|gokishadhawarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhawaro|shadhawaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkro|goshadhawarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhawaro|gokishadhawaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhawarmu|shadhawarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkmu|goshadhawarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhawarmu|gokishadhawarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhawarsher|shadhawarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhawarnksher|goshadhawarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhawarsher|gokishadhawarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhawarng|shadhawarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkng|goshadhawarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhawarng|gokishadhawarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhawarya|shadhawarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkya|goshadhawarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhawarya|gokishadhawarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhawaryam|shadhawaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkyam|goshadhawarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhawaryam|gokishadhawaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhawarnĂŒshĂ«|shadhawarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhawarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhawarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhawarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhawarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhawarnĂŒro|shadhawarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhawarnknĂŒro|goshadhawarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhawarnĂŒro|gokishadhawarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhawarnĂŒmu|shadhawarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhawarnknĂŒmu|goshadhawarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhawarnĂŒmu|gokishadhawarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhawarshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhawarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhawarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhawarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhawarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhawarshĂ«ro|shadhawarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkshĂ«ro|goshadhawarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhawarshĂ«ro|gokishadhawarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhawarshĂ«mu|shadhawarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkshĂ«mu|goshadhawarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhawarshĂ«mu|gokishadhawarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhawaronĂŒ|shadhawaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkronĂŒ|goshadhawarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhawaronĂŒ|gokishadhawaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhawaroshĂ«|shadhawaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkroshĂ«|goshadhawarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhawaroshĂ«|gokishadhawaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhawaromu|shadhawaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkromu|goshadhawarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhawaromu|gokishadhawaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhawarmunĂŒ|shadhawarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkmunĂŒ|goshadhawarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhawarmunĂŒ|gokishadhawarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhawarmushĂ«|shadhawarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkmushĂ«|goshadhawarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhawarmushĂ«|gokishadhawarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhawarmuro|shadhawarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhawarnkmuro|goshadhawarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhawarmuro|gokishadhawarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
